title: Process Termination via the exit() System Call
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of actions performed when a process calls the exit() function in UNIX system programming.
elements: Flush and close all I/O streams
relationships: Sequential flow from calling exit() to final removal
atexit() functions execute after stream cleanup
SIGCHLD signal sent after resource release
Process becomes a ZOMBIE after sending signal until parent reaps it
